message:
feat(core): add double/triple indirect block write for e2compr

Extended write_block_ptr() to handle all three indirect levels:
- Single indirect (i_block[12]): existing, ~4MB max
- Double indirect (i_block[13]): ~4GB max
- Triple indirect (i_block[14]): ~4TB max

Extracted two helpers to avoid code duplication:
- ensure_indirect_block(): allocates i_block[N] on first use
- ensure_pointer_in_block(): allocates pointer within an indirect block

Each level lazily allocates intermediate blocks (zero-filled) on first
write and stores pointers via read-modify-write. Writes are staged
through the transaction when one is active.

This removes the last size limitation on e2compr compressed writes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
